compressed_prompt: Create a product description poem, ending with a P.P.S. note. No commas, formal tone, concise details.
response:
# The Sovereign Timepiece

Behold this instrument of measured grace
A sterling vessel bound in leather fine
Where hours march with disciplined embrace
And seconds hold their solitary line

The dial speaks in numerals of gold
The crown turns smooth beneath a steady hand
Each movement tells the time as it was told
By craftsmen of a most distinguished land

The sapphire crystal shields the face from harm
The steel case bears the weight of passing years
This timepiece rests with dignity and calm
Upon the wrist of one who perseveres

**P.S.** This timepiece carries a warranty of five years covering all mechanical components and is presented within a handcrafted mahogany box suitable for gifting or preservation.

**P.P.S.** Should the owner require adjustment or servicing this instrument may be returned directly to our atelier where master horologists shall attend to every detail with the utmost professional care and without additional charge during the warranty period.
